requestGroupLeader.title: Why Request a Group Leader?
requestGroupLeader.subtitle: The Group Leader is essential for your hotel success
requestGroupLeader.benefit1: They bring clients to your hotel
requestGroupLeader.benefit3: They take care of the group all day
requestGroupLeader.benefit4: They act as the unique link between guests and hotel
requestGroupLeader.commissionText: The Leader only works based on a 5% bonus: initially to cover their own expenses, and once those are covered, the remaining is a cash bonus.
requestGroupLeader.formDescription: Fill out the form below to request a group leader for your hotel
